quoteFirst: Resumed our course 58 degrees through level gum forest, then a spearwood thicket, then dense underwood and patches of gum forest till
quoteLast: , when we came to a native well among granite rocks; having watered the horses, continued the course through the same description of country till 4.40, when we halted at the foot of a granite hill with plenty of rainwater in the hollows and grass on a narrow strip between the scrub and base of the bare rock.
